info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP REST API
Invoices
Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications List invoices

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 25, max 500)

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. Use to limit returned attributes for performance.

params.name: q
params.description: Filter expression using Oracle REST query syntax. Example: InvoiceNumber='INV-001' or InvoiceAmount>1000

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to sort by. Append :asc or :desc for sort direction.

params.name: finder
params.description: Named finder to execute. Format is FinderName;param1=value1,param2=value2

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of child resources to include in the response.

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of accounts payable invoices. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination using standard Oracle REST query parameters.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Create an invoice

items.docs: Create a new accounts payable invoice with header and optionally include invoice lines and distributions.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Get an invoice

params.name: InvoiceId
params.description: Unique identifier for the invoice

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. Use to limit returned attributes for performance.

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of child resources to include in the response.

items.docs: Retrieve a specific accounts payable invoice by its unique identifier.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Update an invoice

params.name: InvoiceId
params.description: Unique identifier for the invoice

items.docs: Update an existing accounts payable invoice.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Delete an invoice

params.name: InvoiceId
params.description: Unique identifier for the invoice

items.docs: Delete an accounts payable invoice.
